overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking cautiously through a dense forest at night while holding a wooden club. The scene features a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall trees and thick undergrowth, illuminated by a dim light source.

events.description: character lowers wooden club, hand and weapon exit bottom of frame
character raises wooden club, hand and weapon re-enter left side of frame

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the forest path holding a wooden club, briefly lowering the weapon mid-walk before raising it again

entered.detail: tall pine tree trunk immediately to the left of the path
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest with scattered stones
thick wall of trees and trunks visible in the dark distance
dense ferns and low vegetation lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily through a narrow forest trail at night, surrounded by dense trees and undergrowth. The wooden club is visible in the left foreground for most of the segment, briefly disappearing as the character lowers their arm around the 9-second mark, then returning at 15 seconds. The path ahead is dimly lit, revealing scattered rocks and fallen branches along the dirt surface.

segments_errors: segment[0]: 首段 changed 应为空

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective moving steadily along a dim, claustrophobic forest trail at night. It begins with the camera advancing through a narrow dirt path, where a wooden club is held firmly in the left foreground against a backdrop of dense trees and thick undergrowth. As the character progresses, the club briefly dips out of view before returning to the frame, maintaining a cautious pace over a surface littered with scattered rocks and fallen branches. The scene then deepens into the shadows of the woods, with the limited light source barely illuminating the oppressive greenery and rugged terrain ahead.
